scope: GSC-derived only (Google Search Console + keyword master list). Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual and are not auto-generated.
wins: Three core San Antonio commercial terms hold #2: 'bariatric counseling san antonio', 'weight loss counseling san antonio', and 'bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' (the latter up from 15.8 on 5/7).
'bariatric surgery counseling' (non-geo) sits at 2.7 with 7 impressions, improved from 14.4 on 5/7 and 7.5 mid-period — the strongest sustained climb among tracked terms.
'bariatric counseling near me' jumped +17.3 positions to 11.7, and 'eating disorder therapist san antonio' improved +3.2 to 10.8 on a real 12 impressions.
The hydration blog post is the site's top puller: 12 clicks / 2,688 impressions at position 5.7; the GLP-1 medications page adds 1,775 impressions at position 9.4.
Discovery shows page-1 unowned demand: 'can/does dehydration cause weight loss' (~108 impressions at pos ~3.4) and 'mounjaro vs zepbound vs ozempic' (29 impressions at pos 10.3).
needs_attention: Keyword coverage: 25 of 74 tracked KEYWORDS show GSC impressions; 49 show none. This is a keyword count, NOT a page count — the 74 keywords map to 49 distinct target pages (42 live www, 7 staging-targeted), and most staging-targeted tracker URLs are stale pointers to pages already live (tracker hygiene, not lost traffic).
Visibility drifted down over the window: impressions 2,447 (5/7) -> 1,706 (6/11, -30%) and impression-weighted avg position 14.87 -> 18.84.
CTR is near zero: 4 clicks on 1,706 impressions (~0.2%) in the latest snapshot; the GLP-1 page earned just 1 click from 1,775 impressions.
Slipped terms with real impressions: 'nutrition counseling' -57.1 to 69.1 (14 imp), 'weight loss counseling' -16.3 to 64.7 (6 imp), 'san antonio bariatric center' -13.7 to 28.3 (9 imp).

Caveat: many tracked positions rest on 1-2 impressions and swing day to day — treat single-impression deltas as directional only. Also note 5 early-June GSC snapshot files (6/01-6/05) were skipped as corrupt JSON, thinning the trend line.
priority_actions: Tracker hygiene first: repoint the 7 staging-targeted and any old-slug targetUrls in keywords-master.json to their live www equivalents so GSC can match — this alone should lift measured coverage above 25/74 keywords.
If a staging->prod publish backlog matters, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's notes — do not infer it from keyword data.

Fix CTR on the two high-impression blog assets: add service-page CTAs and internal links from the hydration post (2,688 imp) and GLP-1 medications page (1,775 imp) into matching BCC service pages, and tighten their titles/meta toward intent.

On-page refresh for the slipped commercial terms — 'nutrition counseling', 'weight loss counseling', 'san antonio bariatric center' — and defend the three #2 SA terms with internal links from the high-impression posts.
Add FAQ schema to the GLP-1 and hydration pages for rich-result / AI-overview eligibility; repair or regenerate the 5 corrupt 6/01-6/05 GSC snapshots so the trend line is complete.
summary: 25 of 74 tracked keywords (not pages) show GSC impressions; core SA terms hold #2 and 'bariatric surgery counseling' climbed to 2.7, but site-wide impressions fell ~30% since 5/7 and CTR is ~0.2% — tracker hygiene plus CTAs on the two high-impression blog pages are the highest-leverage moves.
